feedback.text: I believe ownership to be a fundamental right. Currently digital giants are trying to receive the money for "selling" digital good to a person and then the second it becomes not interesting to them, they just revoke the good. This is not acceptable. Games that are bought should belong to the buyer! Help consumer to return their rights! It is not ok that it is legal that company is allowed to "sell" a game, then next month to close it and revoke the license and still legally keep all the money to itself due to shady license agreement.
